title: Texarkana 1885 map identity review queue
promotion_rule: Candidate matches never become verified building labels, teacher-facing facts, or student-facing art identities until a human reviewer confirms them.

claim_boundary.verified_fact: A confirmed suggestion still requires explicit promotion into a reviewed building or claim record before it becomes verified_fact.
claim_boundary.source_based_inference: All queue items remain source-based inference while they are suggestions, even when they look promising.
claim_boundary.fictional_gameplay: No fictional gameplay identities belong in the verification queue.

suggestions.candidate_label: Potential livery stable match from later archival hints
suggestions.review_notes: Workflow example only. Replace with a verified Portal to Texas History, directory, or newspaper source before any promotion.
The current placeholder source is not enough to publish a location label or bespoke art identity. Keep the building generic until stronger evidence exists.
